description: Perform a patient safety audit by mining unstructured clinical text in the 'DrTuxTest' database. Identify all patients who have the word 'pénicilline' (including variations like 'penicilline' or 'PENICILLINE') mentioned in the 'Legacy_Observations' table, which contains data from an older system linked to patients via GUID. The search must be case-insensitive and accent-insensitive. Export the results to '~/Documents/penicillin_safety_review.csv' with the following columns: PatientGUID, LastName, FirstName, NoteDate, and NoteText.
